ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "university" TEXT /* University the user attended */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief personal bio */,
  "current_job_title" TEXT /* Current job title of the user */,
  "current_company" TEXT /* Current company of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "linkedin_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's LinkedIn profile */,
  "github_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's GitHub profile */,
  "twitter_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's Twitter profile */,
  "portfolio_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's portfolio or personal website */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the company */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the company's website */,
  "company_size" TEXT /* Size of the company */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the company's logo */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the company account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the company account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_postings" (
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job posting */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company posting the job */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Title of the job */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the job */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the job */,
  "required_skills" TEXT /* Skills required for the job */,
  "salary_range" TEXT /* Salary range for the job */,
  "experience_level" TEXT /* Experience level required for the job */,
  "job_type" TEXT /* Type of job (e.g., full-time, part-time, internship) */,
  "application_deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for applying to the job */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the job posting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the job posting was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_postings_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_experience" (
  "experience_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experience entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who has the experience */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company where the user worked */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experience */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experience */,
  "job_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the user's role and responsibilities */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the job experience */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the experience entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the experience entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experience_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_experience_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who has the education */,
  "university" TEXT /* Name of the university attended */,
  "degree" TEXT /* Degree earned by the user */,
  "field_of_study" TEXT /* Field of study of the user */,
  "graduation_date" TEXT /* Date of graduation */,
  "gpa" REAL /* GPA of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the education entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the education entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "skills" (
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skill */,
  "skill_name" TEXT /* Name of the skill */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the skill */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the skill */,
  "level" TEXT /* Proficiency level of the skill */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the skill was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the skill was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("skill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_skills" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who possesses the skill */,
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the skill possessed by the user */,
  "proficiency_level" TEXT /* Proficiency level of the user in the skill */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user skill was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user skill was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "skill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job application */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the application */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job applied for */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the application was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the application (e.g., pending, accepted, rejected) */,
  "cover_letter" TEXT /* Cover letter submitted with the application */,
  "resume_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's resume */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the application was submitted */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the application status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_applications_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES job_postings ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_applications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "messages" (
  "message_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each message */,
  "sender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who sent the message */,
  "receiver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the message */,
  "message_text" TEXT /* Text of the message */,
  "send_date" TEXT /* Date the message was sent */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the message has been read */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the message was sent */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the message was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("message_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_receiver_id FOREIGN KEY ("receiver_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_sender_id FOREIGN KEY ("sender_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discussions" (
  "discussion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discussion */,
  "topic" TEXT /* Topic of the discussion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the discussion */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the discussion was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the discussion */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the discussion was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the discussion was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discussion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discussions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discussion_posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "discussion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the discussion the post belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the post */,
  "post_text" TEXT /* Text of the post */,
  "post_date" TEXT /* Date the post was made */,
  "edited_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the post was last edited */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the post was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the post was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discussion_posts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discussion_posts_discussion_id FOREIGN KEY ("discussion_id") REFERENCES discussions ("discussion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the recommendation */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job recommended to the user */,
  "recommendation_type" TEXT /* Type of recommendation (e.g., job, connection, training) */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was made */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the recommendation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the recommendation was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the recommendation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES job_postings ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trainings" (
  "training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training */,
  "training_name" TEXT /* Name of the training */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the training */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date the training will take place */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the training */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the training was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the training was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_registrations" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each registration */,
  "training_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training the user registered for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who registered for the training */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered for the training */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the registration was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the registration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_registrations_training_id FOREIGN KEY ("training_id") REFERENCES trainings ("training_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_registrations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
